prose:
Method‐provenance block
Property: Total electronic energy (optimized structure), units eV
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) in xtb 6.x
Geometry provenance: started from user-supplied methane.xyz; geometry optimized at the same level (GFN2-xTB) using the geometry-optimize skill (ASE/BFGS driver, fmax target 0.05 eV Å⁻¹); 2 optimization steps, converged.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software: xtb backend via chemkit geometry-optimize skill
Convergence & caveats: converged=true; no warnings returned; GFN2-xTB gives reliable geometries and relative energies but absolute energies are semi-empirical (method accuracy ≈ few kcal mol⁻¹).

Reproducibility artifacts
